nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Areas of smoke. Partly cloudy, with a low around 78. Southwest wind around 2 mph.

nws.name: Saturday
nws.shortForecast: Areas Of Smoke then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: Areas of smoke before 11am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between noon and 3pm, then patchy smoke and a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly sunny, with a high near 92. Heat index values as high as 103. South wind 1 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.
